description: Style NoteThis kurta from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the dark , sober patterns with a beige colour  leggings . We recommend tonal ethnic flats for your feet.Product DetailsBlack kurta, has a mandarin collar and split neckline, red paneling and sequin work at the yoke, beige print all over, three quarter sleeves and side slitsMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
